The '''Battle of Fendry''' was a small conflict fought during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The battle included chases throughout the clouds of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Fendry]]. Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Aven Cholus]] managed to escape with the rest of her [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] and, because of this, she was decorated with the [[Alvace Star]].<ref name="AJ11" />
